name: Chenghe Acquisition III Co.
business: The company is a blank check special purpose acquisition company (SPAC) incorporated in the Cayman Islands, formed to effect a merger, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. It has not selected any specific business combination target and has no operating revenue. The company intends to focus on acquiring growing companies in Asian markets or global businesses with a presence or focus in Asia.

exposures.sentence: The e-commerce and consumer markets have witnessed rapid growth in the Asia-Pacific region over the past decade, and the trend is projected to further continue over the next three to four years.
The e-commerce and consumer markets have witnessed rapid growth in the Asia-Pacific region over the past decade, and the trend is projected to further continue over the next three to four years.

tamClaims.claim: E-commerce in the Asia-Pacific region is anticipated to demonstrate a CAGR of 6.39% from 2023 to 2027, with gross merchandise value projected to rise from $3,855.8 billion in 2022 to $5,108.8 billion by 2027.
tamClaims.sentence: E-commerce is anticipated to demonstrate consistent growth throughout the forecast period, with a Compound Annual Growth Rate ( CAGR ) of 6.39% from 2023 to 2027. The gross merchandise value of E-commerce in this region is projected to rise from $3,855.8 billion in 2022 to $5,108.8 billion by 2027.

tamClaims.claim: The number of e-commerce buyers in Asia is projected to increase by approximately 52% from 2023 to 2028, rising from approximately 1.33 billion to 2.03 billion.
tamClaims.sentence: The number of e-commerce buyers in Asia is also projected to increase by approximately 52% from 2023 to 2028, rising from approximately 1.33 billion to 2.03 billion.

tamClaims.claim: The smart home market in Asia is forecasted to expand at an annual growth rate of 12.12% between 2024 and 2028, resulting in a projected market volume of $95.8 billion by 2028.
tamClaims.sentence: Based on Statista s estimates, the smart home market in Asia is forecasted to expand at an annual growth rate of 12.12% between 2024 and 2028, resulting in a projected market volume of $95.8 billion by 2028.

tamClaims.claim: Asia is expected to represent approximately 50% of the global GDP and is on track to represent 40% of global consumption by 2040.
tamClaims.sentence: Asia is expected to represent approximately 50% of the global GDP and is on track to represent 40% of global consumption by 2040.
